untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'open interest' indicator which is not available in the allowed indicator set. Open interest is a futures-specific metric not present in standard OHLCV data. Volume trend approximated using vol_ratio_20 < 1.0 as a proxy for declining volume.
translation_notes: Translated 'rising prices' to close > prev_close (bidirectional for context-dependent). 'Volume declining' approximated using vol_ratio_20 < 1.0 (volume ratio below 1 indicates below-average volume). Open interest trend cannot be directly translated. Signal interpreted as pending reversal with entry on directional moves + declining volume, exit on reversal of price direction.
